description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses node:latest as the default Docker image and caches the node_modules directory. Define an implicit test stage and an explicit deploy stage. In the test stage add a build-project job that runs on the node:8 image and executes the exact commands: apt-get install git, npm install -g bower grunt-cli, npm install, bower install --allow-root, grunt test, find . -name lcov.info | xargs -d '\n' cat | node_modules/.bin/codacy-coverage -t $CODACY_PROJECT_TOKEN, and grunt release, then archives the coverage/, doc/ and dist/ directories as artifacts that expire in 1 day. In the deploy stage add a pages job that depends on build-project, runs only on the master branch, runs ls -l, mkdir .public, moves coverage/ to .public/coverage/, moves doc/ to .public/doc/, renames .public to public, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact that expires in 90 days.
